title: AI Product Owner
gauntletPrompt: You're shipping a customer-facing agent that occasionally invents product SKUs. The legal team is breathing down your neck and engineering wants to ship next sprint. Walk us through how you would design an eval + rollout plan that catches hallucinated SKUs without delaying the launch by more than 10 days.
description: Own the agent platform powering Stark's customer-facing assistants. Define what 'correct' means, design the evals that prove it, and chart the next 4 quarters of capability. You will work with researchers and platform engineers as peers.

title: Senior Python Engineer — Retrieval
gauntletPrompt: Our retrieval layer returns the right document 81% of the time but cites the wrong paragraph 22% of those. Outline how you would diagnose, fix, and ship an improvement — and how you would prove the fix in production without an offline eval set you trust.
description: Reshape Quanta's grounding stack. You will own the retrieval-to-citation pipeline end-to-end, from chunking to attribution to the eval loop that catches regressions before they ship.

title: Staff Frontend Engineer
gauntletPrompt: We have a patient-facing app where 41% of users are on sub-3G connections. Walk us through the three highest-leverage interventions you would prioritize in the first 60 days, with the trade-offs you would explicitly accept.
description: Lead the frontend architecture across our patient portal, clinician console, and partner widgets. You will mentor 4 engineers and set the perf + a11y bar.

title: Platform Engineer — Payments
gauntletPrompt: Our settlement service occasionally double-debits at exactly midnight IST during DST-adjacent edge cases. Sketch a fix that is correct, ship-able in a week, and provably regression-tested.
description: Own the payment routing fabric. Multi-region, multi-rail, chaos-tested, observed end-to-end.

title: Applied ML Scientist
gauntletPrompt: You inherit a recommender that beats baselines on offline NDCG but loses to baselines on online CTR. Describe a 14-day diagnostic plan and the first experiment you would run.
description: Drive applied ML across personalization, ranking, and trust. The team is six scientists strong.

title: Senior Product Manager — Chronic Care
gauntletPrompt: Adherence to diabetes care plans drops 47% by week 8 in our cohort. You have 90 days and three engineers. What do you ship first, what do you decide not to ship, and how do you measure success at day 90?
description: Own the diabetes and hypertension portfolio. You will work with clinicians, designers, and a small but ferocious eng team.
